message:
bench(fabric): add 6 benchmark groups covering capability checks, publish/request-reply paths, consumer ack, RaptorQ data capsule, and baseline comparison

Significantly expands the fabric benchmark suite with comprehensive
performance measurement infrastructure.

benches/fabric_bench.rs — Adds helper functions (deterministic_bytes,
fabric_capability_schema, fabric_routing_program, bench_fabric_cell,
connect_bench_fabric, allocate_bench_service_obligation,
raptorq_config_for_size, object_params_for) for constructing realistic
benchmark fixtures. Adds 6 new benchmark groups:
  - bench_capability_checks: capability token validation throughput
  - bench_publish_paths: publish path throughput measurement
  - bench_request_reply_paths: full request-reply cycle latency
  - bench_consumer_ack: consumer acknowledgment path throughput
  - bench_raptorq_data_capsule: RaptorQ encode/decode across 1KB, 4KB,
    16KB, and 64KB payload sizes
  - bench_baseline_compare: baseline comparison for regression detection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
